comment.body:
It's sad but we Europeans are doomed to be enslaved by American oil and gas.
If tomorrow we sign agreements with the Chinese and the Americans don't agree, they'll make us pay for it on energy and they'll revive inflation, as Alma keeps telling us.
We're on a chessboard, and clearly the countries of Europe are the front-line pawns.
